what: Parse search query into structured filters (tags, category, text)
why: Decompose user query into typed filters for precise matching against the index

output.console: Parsed query with extracted filters (tags, category, text terms)

success_handling.criteria: Search query is parsed into structured filter object with tag filters, category filter, and free text components identified

error_handling.criteria: Search query is empty or contains only whitespace
error_handling.action: Return all entries (unfiltered) or prompt user for query

event.message: Empty search query, returning all entries

error_handling.criteria: Query contains filter syntax that cannot be parsed (e.g., unclosed brackets, invalid operators)
error_handling.action: Treat the entire query as free text, log warning about unparseable filters

event.message: Could not parse query filters, treating as free text: {parse_error}

decisions.outcome: Proceed to match-entries step with structured filters
Proceed to match-entries with no filters (return all)
Fall back to free text search, proceed to match-entries
